title: Rangana Fort
tagline: Rangana Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Rangana Fort/ Prasiddhagad (Marathi: रांगणा किल्ला) is located in the Bhudargad taluka of Kolhapur district.
overview.description: Rangana Fort/ Prasiddhagad (Marathi: रांगणा किल्ला) is located in the Bhudargad taluka of Kolhapur district. This fort is one of the important forts in the district. It is located on the Sahyadri mountain ridge, on the boundary of the Sindhudurg and Kolhapur districts.

topPlaces.name: Gothos
topPlaces.description: Gothos is a village at the base of Raganagad fort in Sindhudurg District of Maharashtra, India. It lies 19 kilometers (12 mi) east of the district headquarters, Kudal.

topPlaces.name: Talamba Dam
topPlaces.description: Talamba Dam, is an earthfill dam on Karli river near Kudal, Sindhudurg district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Nerukhe
topPlaces.description: Nirukhe is a village in the Konkan division of the taluk of Kudal in Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra state, India. It is surrounded by the Sahyadri mountain ranges and Pithdhaval river.

topPlaces.name: Patgaon
topPlaces.description: Patgaon is a village in Bhudargad Taluka of Kolhapur District, Maharashtra state in western India.The latitude 16.1253483"N and longitude 73.9459679"E are the geographical co-ordinates of Patgaon.

items.note: Gothos is a village at the base of Raganagad fort in Sindhudurg District of Maharashtra, India. It lies 19 kilometers (12 mi) east of the district headquarters, Kudal.
Talamba Dam, is an earthfill dam on Karli river near Kudal, Sindhudurg district in the state of Maharashtra in India.
Nirukhe is a village in the Konkan division of the taluk of Kudal in Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra state, India. It is surrounded by the Sahyadri mountain ranges and Pithdhaval river.
Patgaon is a village in Bhudargad Taluka of Kolhapur District, Maharashtra state in western India.The latitude 16.1253483"N and longitude 73.9459679"E are the geographical co-ordinates of Patgaon.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rangana Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rangana Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rangana Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rangana Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rangana Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rangana Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Rangana Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rangana Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gothos, Talamba Dam, Nerukhe, Patgaon.
